device_delete_info:
If your device limit is full, remove an old device to connect a new one.

⚠️ Note: removing from the list does not uninstall the app. The system simply “forgets” the device, and VPN will stop working on it until you connect it again.

Example: limit is 3 devices, all taken → remove the old phone → connect the new one.
